holdings.infoBox: OAKG is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are BNP Paribas stock at 3.65%, adidas AG at 3.46%, IQVIA Holdings at 3.46%, Sunbelt Rentals Holdings at 3.34%, and Airbnb at 3.14%.

overview.description: The Oakmark Global Large Cap ETF (OAKG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth through an actively managed global portfolio of large-cap companies. Companies are selected based on an investment philosophy that includes quality and value factors. OAKG was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Oakmark.
